ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation (e.g., W-L, W/T) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the operation is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grids" (
  "grid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid */,
  "grid_name" TEXT /* Name of the grid (e.g., wins, earnings) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grid was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grid was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the grid is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criterion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criterion was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the criterion is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "criteria_value" REAL /* Value of the criterion for the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criterion value was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criterion value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id", "experiment_id")
)
